title: Bring Me to Life
why_this_song: Bring Me to Life by Evanescence (2003) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "(Wake me up) wake me up inside"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "(Save me) call my name and save me from the dark"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "(Wake me up) wake me up inside"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "(I can't wake up) wake me up inside"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Bring (bring) me (me) to life"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wake" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "wake" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "save" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: (Wake me up) wake me up inside
(Wake me up) bid my blood to run
Got to open my eyes to everything

exercises.prompt_en: "Bring Me to Life" was released in 2003. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Bring Me to Life" foi lançada em 2003. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Bring Me to Life" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Bring Me to Life" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
